prompt: I need guidance on organizing my course modules using Hugo bundles. Some modules have multiple lessons underneath them, and I want to keep resources like code examples and diagrams with their corresponding lessons. What's the difference between section bundles and leaf bundles, and how should I apply them? Also, how do I keep the Zen theme's CSS clean and maintainable?

assertions.name: section-vs-leaf
assertions.description: Clearly distinguishes section bundles (_index.md) from leaf bundles (index.md)

assertions.name: directory-examples
assertions.description: Shows practical directory structure for modules with multiple lessons

assertions.name: resource-organization
assertions.description: Explains how to keep resources (code, diagrams) with corresponding content

assertions.name: css-simplicity
assertions.description: Explicitly addresses keeping CSS clean, minimalist philosophy, structure over decoration, and how bundles prevent CSS bloat
